title: gloxinia planalta
intro: Gloxinia planalta, also known as Sidalcea planalta, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as having antimicrobial properties that can aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Gloxinia planalta typically involve making tea from the plant's leaves and roots, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
